_comment: Young, pre-profit high-growth company (illustrative). The archetype Damodaran calls the 'dark side' of valuation: value hinges on SURVIVAL probability + the PATH to a target margin, not on (negative) current earnings. Uses the engine's failure branch. Money in $M, shares in M, rates decimals. Drives dcf_valuation.py.
_revenue: $2B base, growth high and declining toward the riskfree rate
_margin: currently lossmaking (-15%); a credible PATH to a 20% target by year 7 is the crux of the case
_tax: no tax while lossmaking; effective rate ramps to marginal as profits arrive
_failure: real chance the company never reaches scale; 25% failure probability, ~$2/share distress value
